title: Announcing Updated Diploma Information
description: Students at NYU Shanghai will receive two diplomas, as follows:1. New York University, founded in 1831 AND2. 上海纽约大学 (NYU Shanghai), founded in 2012.NYU Shanghai is recognized in China as the only Chinese joint venture university involving an American partner that is authorized to grant degrees,
text:
Announcing Updated Diploma Information
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
Students at NYU Shanghai will receive two diplomas, as follows:
1. New York University, founded in 1831 AND2. 上海纽约大学 (NYU Shanghai), founded in 2012.
NYU Shanghai is recognized in China as the only Chinese joint venture university involving an American partner that is authorized to grant degrees, certified by China's Ministry of Education

text_blocks.text: Students at NYU Shanghai will receive two diplomas, as follows:
1. New York University, founded in 1831 AND2. 上海纽约大学 (NYU Shanghai), founded in 2012.
NYU Shanghai is recognized in China as the only Chinese joint venture university involving an American partner that is authorized to grant degrees, certified by China's Ministry of Education
